_comment: Shop bundles extracted from fruit-splash-showcase src/routes/shop.tsx. No backend table exists yet — see STRUCTURE.md (product_bundle). price_ngn is a fixed pack price. items_label is display copy; item composition is not itemised in the frontend.

bundles.name: Starter 6-Pack
bundles.description: Six bottles, your pick of any classic flavours. The easiest way to discover a new favourite.

bundles.name: Detox 12-Pack
bundles.description: Twelve bottles built around our Detox, Immune Booster and Blood Booster. A clean two-week reset.

bundles.name: Family 20-Pack
bundles.description: Twenty bottles, mixed sizes — enough fresh juice for a household for two full weeks.

bundles.name: Mrs. Samuel Gift Box
bundles.description: Four Specials wrapped beautifully — Pink Paradise, Guyabano Delight and two seasonal picks. Birthdays. Baby showers. Sorry-I-missed-it.
